creator: os@rsu.ru
text:
I've installed FreeBSD 7.0-RC1 on Fujitsu-Siemens Celsius M460. snd_hda
works nice, except it plays sound on all outputs (rear jack, front jack
and internal speaker). Plugging in headphones or external speakers doesn't
mute internal one. I've read about similar issues and have tried all
solutions from
http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/htdig/freebsd-multimedia/2007-January/005687.html,
but none of them helped me. With hdac.c from
http://people.freebsd.org/~ariff/test/hdac.c there's no messages on jack
insertion/removing and no speaker line in mixer.

I'd greatly appreciate any help.

Here is dmesg of verbose boot:
